name: TallyBench — Everyday Calculators
description: 27 free calculators: percentage, age, currency, BMI, loan/EMI, mortgage, tax, GST/VAT, days between dates, calorie/BMR, unit conversion, discount, investment/CAGR, GPA, scientific, tip, password, word count, break-even/margin, week number, and unit shortcuts (cm/in, kg/lb, C/F).
